details.note: Wrapped 6 ipcMain.handle() handlers with withIpcResult: GITHUB_OAUTH_START, GITHUB_OAUTH_CALLBACK, GITHUB_GET_TOKEN, GITHUB_SET_TOKEN, GITHUB_CLEAR_TOKEN, GITHUB_API_PROXY. Added import.
Wrapped PLUGIN_INVOKE handler with withIpcResult. Left PLUGIN_SEND ipcMain.on() handler unchanged (fire-and-forget). Added import.
